## What & why

<!-- What does this change do, and why? Link any related issue: "Closes #123". -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Chore / tooling

## How was it tested?

<!-- Commands you ran, scenarios you exercised, screenshots for UI changes. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run test:smoke` passes (and I added a suite for any new pure logic)
- [ ] I added/updated tests and docs where relevant
- [ ] My commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] For data-model changes: I included a Prisma migration and noted any manual steps
